interior_detail.name: Interior Detail
interior_detail.description: Mobile interior detailing. Vacuum carpets, mats, seats, trunk, hard-to-reach areas. Clean and wipe down all interior surfaces — dash, console, door panels, cupholders, vents, trim. Removes built-up dust, light stains, grime, and debris. Deep clean on high-touch areas.

exterior_detail.name: Exterior Detail (Wash, Clay, Seal)
exterior_detail.description: Full hand wash, clay bar treatment to pull embedded contaminants, then a durable paint sealant for gloss, water beading, and protection. Great for drivers who want shine without stepping into full paint correction.

full_in_and_out.name: Full In & Out Package
full_in_and_out.description: Complete interior reset + deep exterior clean in one appointment. Vacuum, wipe-down, all interior surfaces, plus full wash, decontamination, and sealant on the outside. Best all-around full detail.

premier_package.name: Premier Package
premier_package.description: Our ultimate fixed-price package — interior + exterior detail, engine bay, glass ceramic sealant, interior ceramic coating, and odor removal if needed. Premium results, all-in-one service.

paint_enhancement.name: Paint Enhancement Package
paint_enhancement.description: Middle ground between basic detail and full correction. Full exterior wash, paint decontamination, sealant, 1-step paint correction, and ceramic glass sealant. Removes light defects and boosts gloss.

paint_correction_1step.name: 1-Step Paint Correction
paint_correction_1step.description: Improves gloss, clarity, and removes light swirls, haze, and minor defects. Wash, decon, polish, one correction stage. Great daily-driver upgrade before adding a ceramic.

paint_correction_2step.name: 2-Step Paint Correction
paint_correction_2step.description: Cutting stage to reduce deeper swirls and oxidation, followed by a polishing stage to refine. Dramatic improvement on neglected paint. By quote only — needs a photo or in-person look.

paint_correction_3step.name: 3-Step Paint Correction + Unique Defects
paint_correction_3step.description: Most intensive paint restoration. Multi-stage refinement to chase the deepest gloss and clarity. Best finish achievable before ceramic coating. By quote only.
paint_correction_3step.quote_note: Requires photos and in-person inspection. Routes to owner.

ceramic_2yr.name: 2-Year Ceramic Coating
ceramic_2yr.description: Long-lasting paint protection with strong water beading, easier maintenance, and deep glossy finish. Includes full wash, decon, prep, and coating application.

ceramic_lifetime.name: Lifetime Warranty Ceramic Coating
ceramic_lifetime.description: Highest level of long-term paint protection. Premium ceramic system, durable protective layer, max gloss and chemical resistance. By quote only — requires paint inspection.

engine_bay.name: Engine Bay Detail
engine_bay.description: Safely cleans and dresses the engine bay. Removes dust, grime, leaves, built-up dirt. Better look, easier maintenance, easier inspections.

glass_ceramic_windshield.name: Glass Ceramic Sealant — Windshield Only
glass_ceramic_windshield.description: 2-year durable protection for the windshield. Better visibility, water repellency, easier maintenance.

glass_ceramic_all.name: Glass Ceramic Sealant — All Glass
glass_ceramic_all.description: 2-year durable protection on all windows. Improves wet-weather visibility across the whole vehicle.

interior_ceramic.name: Interior Ceramic Coating
interior_ceramic.description: Protects interior surfaces from daily wear. Cleaner, newer-looking, easier to maintain. Premium upgrade for new vehicles or clients who want interior protection long-term.

odor_removal.name: Odor Removal
odor_removal.description: Targets and reduces odors at the source — food, smoke, pets, moisture, general buildup. Best paired with a full interior detail.

pet_hair_t1.name: Pet Hair Removal — Tier 1 (light)
pet_hair_t1.description: Light pet hair — surface shedding, manageable.

pet_hair_t2.name: Pet Hair Removal — Tier 2 (moderate)
pet_hair_t2.description: Moderate pet hair — embedded in carpets and seats.

pet_hair_t3.name: Pet Hair Removal — Tier 3 (heavy)
pet_hair_t3.description: Heavy pet hair — caked into upholstery, requires extensive extraction.

deposit.policy: Required to hold the spot. Trusted repeat clients can be flagged 'deposit_waived' in the customer record.

season.note: Apr 1 - Aug 31. Mobile only. Off-season inquiries route to owner with a 'next season waitlist' message.
